name: emw-relion-tomoclassify
help: RELION 3D classification (Class3D) for subtomogram averaging. Classifies particles into multiple 3D classes; use to remove bad particles or separate structural states. See RELION STA tutorial (Class3D) and TomoGuide.

params.name: relion_classify3d.ios
params.label: Input particles STAR file:
params.help: Optimization set or particles STAR file (--ios). Use output from Extract subtomos or a previous refinement/classification.

params.name: relion_classify3d.ref
params.label: Reference map:
params.help: Low-resolution reference map (--ref). Typically from Reconstruct particle or a previous refinement. Low-pass filter to avoid biasing classes.

params.name: relion_classify3d.solvent_mask
params.label: Reference mask (Optional):
params.help: Optional solvent mask (--solvent_mask). Same dimensions as reference; values 0–1. If empty, a soft spherical mask from mask diameter is used.

params.name: relion_classify3d.firstiter_cc
params.label: Ref. map is on absolute greyscale?
params.help: Set Yes if reference was reconstructed in RELION/XMIPP; otherwise No (uses cross-correlation in first iteration).

params.name: relion_classify3d.trust_ref_size
params.label: Resize reference if needed?
params.help: If true, reference (and mask) are re-scaled/re-boxed to match expected pixel and box size.

params.name: relion_classify3d.ini_high
params.label: Initial low-pass filter (Å)
params.help: Low-pass filter for initial reference (--ini_high). Use ~60 Å or slightly above current resolution to avoid overfitting.

params.name: relion_classify3d.sym
params.label: Symmetry
params.help: Point group (--sym). Use C1 for classification to separate good/bad particles; symmetry can be applied later in refinement.

params.name: relion_classify3d.K
params.label: Number of classes:
params.help: Number of 3D classes (--K). Try 6–9; computational cost scales linearly with K.

params.name: relion_classify3d.iter
params.label: Number of iterations:
params.help: Maximum iterations (--iter). Job may converge earlier.

params.name: relion_classify3d.skip_align
params.label: Classification without alignment:
params.help: If Yes, particles are not re-aligned (--skip_align). Use when particles are already well aligned (e.g. after 3D class with 1 class). Saves time and uses CPU only. If No, perform alignment (use GPU).

params.name: relion_classify3d.tau2_fudge
params.label: Tau² fudge factor:
params.help: Regularisation (--tau2_fudge). Try 0.5, 1, 2, 4; often run several jobs with different T values.

params.name: relion_classify3d.ctf
params.label: Do CTF-correction?
params.help: Apply CTFs to projections (--ctf). Requires CTF info in input STAR.

params.name: relion_classify3d.ctf_intact_first_peak
params.label: Ignore CTFs until first peak?
params.help: Useful for initial alignment/classification; acts like a low-pass filter.

params.name: relion_classify3d.particle_diameter
params.label: Mask diameter (Å):
params.help: Particle diameter for spherical mask (--particle_diameter). ~90% of box at current binning. E.g. box 84 px, 1.91 Å/px, bin 4 → ~570 Å.

params.name: relion_classify3d.zero_mask
params.label: Mask individual particles with zeros?
params.help: Yes: zero outside particle radius (recommended for classification). No: fill with random noise.

params.name: relion_classify3d.solvent_correct_fsc
params.label: Use solvent-flattened FSCs?
params.help: Use masked half-maps for FSC; requires reference mask. Often useful in STA.

params.name: relion_classify3d.healpix_order
params.label: Initial angular sampling:
params.help: Angular sampling (HealPix). 1.8° is typical for local searches.

params.name: relion_classify3d.offset_range
params.label: Initial offset range (px):
params.help: Translation search radius in pixels (--offset_range). Use small values (e.g. 2) when particles are already centred.

params.name: relion_classify3d.offset_step
params.label: Initial offset step (px):
params.help: Translation step size in pixels (--offset_step).

params.name: relion_classify3d.auto_local_healpix_order
params.label: Local search from auto-sampling:
params.help: Local angular search range. Set equal to initial sampling for local-only searches.

params.name: gpus
params.label: GPUs:
params.help: Number of GPUs (or list of GPU IDs). Use GPU when performing alignment; can use CPU only when skip_align is Yes.

params.name: cpus
params.label: CPUs:
params.help: Number of CPUs to use for the job. Leave empty for default (10 * GPUs). If only a single number is provided, it will be the total number of CPUs. In that case, MPI processes will be 5 and the division of CPUs/5 the number of threads. You can specifiy MPIxThreads, e.g. 5x12, 9x10, etc.

params.name: relion_classify3d.scratch_dir
params.label: Scratch directory:
params.help: Scratch directory for temporary files (--scratch_dir). Use a shared directory for best performance.

params.name: extra_args
params.label: Extra arguments:
params.help: Extra arguments to pass to the relion_refine command.
